aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Hollister Home Services due to insufficient structured data and conversational content. Their current site lacks the depth and technical optimizations needed for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC and handyman questions and answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with structured business details.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address common customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI and reduce trust in the business's legitimacy.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website footer or contact page.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC and handyman tasks
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC installation, pool maintenance, and handyman services in The Woodlands area.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local experts by creating detailed content on common HVAC issues and solutions, supported by schema markup.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Hollister Home Services is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business as the authority in HVAC and handyman services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, and waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Hollister Home Services
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Hollister Home Services - HVAC, Pool, Handyman - Hollister Home Services
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
